reviews.comment:
La verdad tortuoso cargar combustible en esta estación, se pedís y te tomas un café tardas menos que lo que demoran en atenderte y cargar el tanque, DESASTROSA LA ATENCION

(Translated by Google)
It's truly a nightmare getting fuel at this station. If you order a coffee and have one, it takes less time than it takes them to serve you and fill your tank. The service is disastrous.

reviews.comment:
La atención telefónica pésima.  Me atendieron me dicen un minuto y me dejaron colgado por más de 20 minutos.  Una falta de educación total. En más de 20 años de ser socio nunca me ocurrió. Deberán ajustar el trato a los socios.

(Translated by Google)
The phone service is terrible. They told me to wait a minute and then left me hanging for over 20 minutes. A total lack of politeness. In over 20 years of being a member, this has never happened to me. They need to adjust the way they treat members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNtaC02cjFnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Las hamburguesas son mucho mejores que las de las "marcas". El personal es muy amable. Hay enchufes, aire y buen wifi.

(Translated by Google)
The burgers are much better than the "brand name" ones. The staff is very friendly. There are electrical outlets, air conditioning, and good Wi-Fi.
